rawContent: Letta Code | Letta Docs Skip to content Letta Docs Search Ctrl K Auto Light Dark Sign up Letta Code API Docs API Reference Letta Code API Docs API Reference Get started Overview Quickstart Pricing Using Letta Code Desktop App CLI Remote (mobile) Features Memory Skills Subagents Models Providers Permissions Secrets Hooks Remote environments Schedules Channels Letta Code SDK Quickstart Migrate Claude Agent SDK Reference Headless mode GitHub Action Changelog Slash commands CLI reference Auto-looping Configuration Docker How it works Discord Auto Light Dark Get started Overview Copy Markdown Open in Claude Open in ChatGPT Open in Cursor Copy Markdown View as Markdown Letta Code The memory-first agent, that remembers and learns Letta Code is a deeply personalized stateful agent that can learn from experience and improve with use. The Letta Code agent harness is fully open source and builds on our latest research in AI memory and continual learning. You can use Letta Code for: Coding : A state-of-the-art coding agent that learns your coding conventions and important codebase patterns over time. Digital employees : Highly autonomous AI employees that can write reports, research topics, manage your calendar and email. AI companions : Digital entitites with deeply customized personalities and living memories. Chat via the desktop app, mobile, or Telegram. Get started with Letta Code → Letta Code is built on the Letta API. Looking to build directly on top of the API? See the API documentation . Quickstart Quickstart guide Download the Letta Code desktop app or try the CLI. Memory Memory system Learn how to setup and customize Letta Code's memory system. Skills Skills system Extend your agent's abilities with skills, either learned, or pre-made.
